{{Infobox construct
| name = Abyssal Palace collection towers
| introduced = Wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Abyssal Palace]] has collection towers erected over the homes of Sky’s Edge.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c24">''Wintersteel'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Abyssal Palace collection towers]] are scripted to prevent spiritual detection.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c24" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Abyssal Palace collection towers]] are intended to collect [[Dreadgod madra]] for their sect.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c24" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
